rows.descriptionDamageText: Helicopter Spin: Piolo spins his nunchaku in the targeted direction, dealing 8(+14% Skill Amp) skill damage every 0 |  Piolo deals 30(+25% Skill Amp) enhanced skill damage against enemies at 1, 5, and 10 hits |  If Helicopter Spin was cast with full duration or if it dealt enhanced skill damage 2 times, Piolo becomes able to cast Chokeslam |  Chokeslam: Piolo slams his nunchaku in the targeted direction, dealing 60(+80% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies within the inner indicator and slowing them by 60% for 1 |  Enemies within the outer indicator take 50(+60% Skill Amp) skill damage

rows.notes: Damage text was found only in the description, not a per-level wiki stat field.
